dismissalText.commentary: Abhishek Sharma c Iyer b Ferguson 35 (13b 2x4 4x6 17m) SR: 269.23

dismissalComment.html: first wicket of the season for Lockie. Abhishek looks to flat-bat this down town but ends up skewing it high to Shreyas at mid-off. That went a mile high. Enough time for any fielder to overthink. Nicely taken.

dismissalText.commentary: Travis Head c Jansen b Chahal 38 (19b 3x4 3x6 32m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: doesn't get to the pitch but goes through with the lofted hit and ends up miscuing it long-off, where Jansen moves a few steps to his left to take the skier. Well-disguised wrong'un from Chahal, got that to dip nicely on Head who was foxed by the length.

dismissalText.long: c Suryansh Shedge b Arshdeep Singh
dismissalText.commentary: Ishan Kishan c Suryansh Shedge b Arshdeep Singh 55 (32b 2x4 4x6 51m) SR: 171.87

dismissalComment.html: taken!! Finally. Shedge is at deep square leg. PBKS hold on to a catch after what seems like a day. Arsh bowled short to Kishan as well, and one at a lack of pace. Kishan shifted his weight back and went hard for the pull. But there was the longer boundary there, and Shedge did well to move to his left and grab it

dismissalText.commentary: Heinrich Klaasen c Jansen b Vyshak 69 (43b 3x4 4x6 64m) SR: 160.46

dismissalComment.html: Jansen takes it at long-off!! SRH can't touch 240. Vyshak bowled a slower delivery, and on a hittable length outside off. But all Klaasen could do was balloon it up miles in the air. Jansen moves forward and takes it low to restrict SRH to 235

dismissalText.commentary: Priyansh Arya c Malinga b Cummins 1 (3b 0x4 0x6 5m) SR: 33.33

dismissalComment.html: what a moment that! Malinga was strategically placed on the boundary at deep square and Priyansh Arya has fallen to the trap. This is an excellent short delivery that's angled across, Arya has to fetch it from quite some way outside off, he ends up hitting it well but perhaps didn't account for the fielder patrolling the boundary. Cummins has his arms aloft, seemingly suggesting he was merely playing to the plan all along.

dismissalComment.html: well taken by Abhishek!! What a contrast between the two teams' catching today. Abhishek is at deep midwicket, and runs in considerably to take a sliding catch. dismissalText.long: c Cummins b Nitish Kumar Reddy
dismissalText.commentary: Prabhsimran Singh c Cummins b Nitish Kumar Reddy 3 (4b 0x4 0x6 7m) SR: 75

dismissalComment.html: make that two in two! PBKS are in early strife. Nitish floats one a touch fuller, the ball curls away a hint and Prabhsimran ends up getting a leading edge that loops high towards backward point. Cummins called for it, covered good ground to his left from cover and tumbled around to complete the catch.

dismissalText.commentary: Shreyas Iyer c Cummins b Malinga 5 (5b 1x4 0x6 11m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: is that the game? Shreyas has picked out his opposite number at mid-off! Looks to go down town but the bat face turns in his hand. Malinga goes hard length so he also hits this very high on the bat, simple catch to the skipper. Malinga is ecstatic, PBKS not so much.

dismissalText.commentary: Marcus Stoinis c †Ishan Kishan b Shivang Kumar 28 (14b 3x4 2x6 18m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: taken on the second attempt! Not a ball that had 'wicket' written on it, but he still has one. Stoinis looks to give this a proper thrashing but this wrong'un considerably slowed down and took an age to get to him as the thick edge is pouched by Kishan.

dismissalText.commentary: Suryansh Shedge c Abhishek Sharma b Cummins 25 (17b 1x4 2x6 24m) SR: 147.05

dismissalComment.html: well taken by Abhishek!! What a contrast between the two teams' catching today. Abhishek is at deep midwicket, and runs in considerably to take a sliding catch. Cummins bowls a cutter - a slower bouncer, in fact - and Shedge goes for the pull. But the ball takes off from the top half of the bat, as Cummins gets some extra bounce
